description_long: This is an acoustic guitar with a classic dreadnought body shape, featuring a natural wood grain finish on both the front and back. The soundboard is adorned with a circular sound hole and a dark bridge with six bridge pins, while the neck is fitted with a dark fingerboard and metallic frets. The sides of the guitar display a smooth, slightly curved profile, and one side includes a visible electronic control panel, indicating it is an acoustic-electric model. The back of the guitar showcases a bookmatched wood pattern and a central seam, with the neck extending from the body and ending in a headstock with tuning pegs. The headstock is light-colored and appears to have a standard six-in-line tuning peg arrangement, though no visible brand logo is present. The overall construction suggests a combination of wood for the body and neck, metal for the strings and hardware, and plastic for the control panel and bridge pins.
description: A natural-finish acoustic-electric guitar with a classic body shape, visible electronic controls, and a six-in-line headstock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sound hole, bridge, fingerboard, and the natural wood grain of the soundboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's curved body profile and the thickness of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bookmatched wood grain, central seam, and the back of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the electronic control panel embedded in the guitar's side.
attribute_headstock_design: Standard six-in-line headstock with light wood finish and no visible logo
